history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An esports-style poster shows five armed characters surrounding large headline text about “FF BATTLE OF CHAMPIONS,” with match details and rules arranged in multiple labeled sections.

Main Subject:
The central focus is the large title text “FF BATTLE OF CHAMPIONS” with “2 VS 2” and additional stylized text, surrounded by five illustrated characters wearing tactical or combat outfits and holding futuristic-looking weapons. One character at the top left has spiky light-colored hair and a face covering, another at the top right has a similar spiky hairstyle and a face covering, a character on the left bottom wears a dark face mask and holds a purple glowing weapon, and two characters on the right and lower right wear caps or helmets with goggles and carry red-accented firearms.

Setting:
The background is a dark, smoky, high-contrast graphics design with bursts of sparks and streaks radiating outward, resembling a gaming tournament promotional banner. Lighting is dramatic, with warm orange and yellow highlights and bright white title text.

Visual Details:
At the top, the headline “FF” appears in large white letters with metallic texture, with orange-yellow decorative wings or spikes behind it. Beneath that, “BATTLE” appears in bold gold letters with dark outlines. “OF” appears small in white, and “CHAMPIONS” is written in large white block letters. “2 VS 2” is centered in gold and white stylized lettering, and a large white “DUO” is placed below. Multiple sections at the bottom are framed in gold-bordered boxes with icons and bold headings. The left section titled “HADIAH:” lists four prize tiers in numbered circles with amounts. The middle section titled “RULES:” contains a bullet-like list of rule statements. Another section titled “SKILL KARAKTER” shows headshot images of several characters with names next to them. A section titled “SKIL PET” shows the name “FALCO” next to an illustrated bird-like figure. The bottom row includes boxes labeled “Note: FULL SLOT GAS!”, “ADMIN:” with contact icons and numbers, and “NO PEMBAYARAN” with a messaging icon and a phone number. The overall composition is symmetrical around the central text, with characters positioned at the left and right sides, facing inward.

Practical Summary:
The image is a tournament promotional poster for “FF BATTLE OF CHAMPIONS” featuring “2 VS 2” and a “DUO” subtitle. It lists a schedule, entry cost, slot count, prize amounts, rules, character and pet names, and admin/payment contact information.

# Notes
- “**SG2 Only (2 hit/nek an)**” and some wording in the rules appear slightly unclear; extracted as visible: **(2 hit/nek an)** and **SISANYA BARAN**, **15 MENIT BUM MASUK ROOM DISS**. If you want, upload a higher-resolution image and I can re-check these exact spellings.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
